title: Mubert Track
description: A generative music track produced by the Mubert AI Music API v3. Tracks are unique per request and composed of artist-contributed loops, samples, and stems blended by the Mubert generation engine.

session_id.description: Client-supplied or server-assigned session identifier used to deduplicate and to fetch a track once generation completes.

playlist_index.description: Playlist selector (e.g. '1.0.0') referencing a Mubert mood/genre/activity branch.

prompt.description: Free-text or image-derived prompt used to bias generation.

intensity.description: Numeric intensity level (typically 1-3 mapped to low/medium/high).

mode.description: Whether the track is a one-shot composition or a seamless loop.
